name: Sapio Sciences
description: Sapio Sciences provides an AI-native lab informatics platform that unifies LIMS, ELN, and Scientific Data Cloud capabilities for life sciences research. The platform exposes a RESTful API enabling programmatic access to laboratory workflows, experimental data, LIMS processes, sample management, and instrument integrations.

hasPart.name: Sapio REST API
hasPart.description: RESTful API providing programmatic access to the Sapio Informatics Platform for laboratory workflow automation, data record management, experiment tracking, and webhook-based integrations.

hasPart.name: sapiopylib
hasPart.description: Official Python client library for the Sapio Informatics Platform REST API, supporting data record manipulation, picklist services, notebook experiments, webhook servers, and batch request processing.
